title: Support FriendlyBet
intro: FriendlyBet is and will remain free. Two friends build it in our spare time, and every voluntary contribution helps us cover server and maintenance costs, keep improving the app, and develop new products for the community.
voluntary: Your donation is 100% voluntary. The app works the same for everyone, whether you donate or not.
scanHint: Scan the QR code from your bank's app (Bre-B payments, from any financial institution in Colombia) or use our key:
abroadPrefix: Outside Colombia and want to support us? Write to us at
thanks: Every contribution, no matter how small, makes a difference. Thanks for playing with us!
